---
title: "ESMV UE5"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-13"
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

library(rstudioapi)
library(tidyverse)

Sys.unsetenv("VIRTUAL_ENV")
library(reticulate)
py_require("MIDIUtil")
py_require("mido")
py_require("pandas")
py_require("music21")
py_require("partitura")
py_require("setuptools")
py_require("typing-extensions")
py_config()
py_require()

setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))  
```


## music21 Grundlagen
Online-Referenz aller Module von music21:
https://music21.org/music21docs/moduleReference/index.html

```{python}
#Importieren aller Module
from music21 import * 


```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```


```{python}

```
